title: sideroxylon pohlmanianum
intro: Sideroxylon pohlmanianum, also known as the Pohlman's Ironwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sideroxylon pohlmanianum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of fever and infections, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the bark of this plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
